title: Where There’s a Will, There’s a Way

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, Doto, Ayabe, and Top Road have teamed up, huh. Sounds
like a strong team.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Ryan and Bright. They look like they're up to no good... Time
to go into ninja mode. Nin nin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Since it's a triathlon, we'll probably need someone with good
endurance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, how about Spe? She's a great eater, so she knows how to fuel up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My, my. Her plate is overflowing as usual. Hehe, going for seconds,
are we? She's still got more room to fill up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I think you're right. She seems like she'd have good endurance. I'm
sure she would be an invaluable addition to our team.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's wait till she's finished eating and ask her! Uh, Bright?
What's up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We'll need brains too, since we're new to this kind of
competition. I have someone in mind for the last spot.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Triathlon, triathlon... There it is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Oh, Ryan! And you're with Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So you were looking for books about the triathlon. Well that makes
this easy. Spe, would you like to join our team?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you... scouting me?! Why me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Cause you can eat a ton, so you'll have plenty of energy to complete
a triathlon. Not to mention, you've got some nice, supple muscles on
you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I do? How can you tell just by looking?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ryan knows muscles so well, she can hear their little voices!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hah, well believe me when I say I came to you 'cause you have talent.
So, what do you say? Wanna team up with us?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, to tell you the truth, I'm more interested in the prize buffet than
the triathlon itself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So you've got your eye on the prize! That's perfect, 'cause we're in it
to win it too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really? Sounds great! I'd love to join you! Let's win this buffet!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Spe's joining Ryan! Gee, this team looks strong too! Let's put a star by
this one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe, getting some good intel there, Detective Matikanetannhauser?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: WHA! B-B-Bright?! I'm not spying or anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: If you're still looking for a team, would you consider joining ours?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um, I think you've got the wrong person.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so. I'm inviting you because I've seen how good you are
at gathering information and applying your research to training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A win would mean so much to me. I want to uphold the Mejiro name.
And I also want to win for my big sister Ryan, who's watched over me
since I was little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So please lend me your skills. To have a chance at victory, we need
you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You need... me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I-i-it would be an honor! If you don't mind having me! I'm pretty
average, but I'll do my best for the team!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's an honor to have you. With this lineup, I feel confident we can win
it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hey Kita, today's the deadline for entering the triathlon, you know.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I know...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Do you think we can find two team members?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...What do you th—

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
Whoa!
Ack!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I wasn't looking where I was going.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No problem at all, don't you fret. Oh? Are you two entering the
triathlon?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...No, well... we're, um...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I saw your name on the list, Bakushin O. Have you decided on your
teammates?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. In the first leg, Sakura Bakushin O. In the second leg, Sakura
Bakushin O. Third leg, Sakura Bakushin O. And the anchor, Sakura
Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What?! Are you seriously doing the whole event by yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am indeed! At first I asked my classmates to join me, but everyone
declined.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They seemed worried about me, saying it would require too much
stamina.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But perhaps I made them too nervous to team up with me, being the
class representative and all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And that's why, as class rep, I have decided to face the challenge
head-on and enter as a one-person team! Ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: W-wow... You've got a will of steel!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You must have overcome a lot of trials here to have that kind of
determination.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Reckless as it may be, I welcome the challenge! The tougher the
better! I'll enter even if I'm by myself!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Reckless as it may be... The tougher the better...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia, let's enter! I actually do want to compete!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We've finally got a chance to do an event together. Even if we're no
match for the others, even if they laugh at us, I want to team up with
you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita! Me too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O, would you do us the honor of joining our team? Please
let us learn from you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: We still don't have enough teammates! You'd be doing us a big favor!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see, you are in a predicament! Very well! If that's the case, then I will
lend you a hand. Why? Because I'm the class rep!
Hey, hey, hey! My search is over! This is perfect! This is the team I've been looking for!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: G-Golshi?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Man, it was worth waiting till the last minute. Who knew such an
interesting team would form!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's like a collision of personalities—no, a collision of variables! This
can only result in a big BANG!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: So anyways, I'll be joining your team! You're welcome!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Okay! Pleased to have you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Mm. With these three teams, we complete the roster.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
On team "Centurial"—T.M. Opera O, Meisho Doto, Admire Vega, and
Narita Top Road.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
On team "Muscle"—Mejiro Ryan, Mejiro Bright, Special Week, and
Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And team "Bakushin"—Sakura Bakushin O, Gold Ship, Kitasan Black,
and Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
There are eight teams in total. This is shaping up to be an exciting
anniversary event! What good fortune!
